articles.title: Serie D, Milan Futuro winning against Brusaporto: the ranking
articles.summary: A great victory. Milan Futuro dominates and wins in Brusaporto, beating the Bergamo team with a clear 4-0.

articles.title: Milanello, today the resumption of training in view of Verona
articles.summary: As learned by the editorial staff of MilanNews.it, the Rossoneri will return to the pitch at Milanello today to resume training in view of the away match to Verona on Sunday afternoon.

articles.title: Serie A, Inter wins by overcoming Como: it ends 3-4 in favor of the Nerazzurri
articles.summary: At the Sinigaglia the hosts went ahead by two goals with Alex Valle and Nico Paz, then the Nerazzurri's comeback began with two braces from Thuram and Dumfries. The final assault by Fabregas' team after Da Cunha's penalty was useless.

articles.title: Milan Futuro, Oddo like this despite the victory: "We could have scored more goals, I even got a little angry"
articles.summary: Milan Futuro returns to victory and does so with a clear 4-0 defeat against Brusaporto. Great performance from the team even beyond the score, with a courageous and purely offensive match.

articles.title: Viviano: "Milan didn't deserve to be where they are during the year"
articles.summary: Emiliano Viviano, former Serie A goalkeeper and current commentator on television but also on the web, spoke after the Milan-Udinese 0-3 match on the screens of Controcalciotv, on Twitch, to talk about Milan's current moment.
